page.content: In Table 1, the headers include Mean T2 (ms), FWHM T2 (ms), Ecc (%), with subcategories for Septum and Free Wall. For row A, values are 66 ± 10 ms for Septum Mean T2, 55 ± 12* ms for Free Wall Mean T2, 27 ± 8 ms for Septum FWHM T2, 19 ± 6* ms for Free Wall FWHM T2, 14.8 ± 0.7% for Septum Ecc, and 14.7 ± 0.8% for Free Wall Ecc. Row B presents 63 ± 13 ms for Septum Mean T2, 53 ± 6 ms for Free Wall Mean T2, 27 ± 10 ms for Septum FWHM T2, 21 ± 8 ms for Free Wall FWHM T2, 11.2 ± 1.5% for Septum Ecc, and 12.0 ± 0.9% for Free Wall Ecc. Row C shows 63 ± 13 ms for Septum Mean T2, 66 ± 12 ms for Free Wall Mean T2, 22 ± 7 ms for Septum FWHM T2, 26 ± 6 ms for Free Wall FWHM T2, 7.0 ± 0.7% for Septum Ecc, and 7.7 ± 0.9% for Free Wall Ecc.

page.content: Row N1 indicates 67 ± 20 ms for Septum Mean T2, 48 ± 8* ms for Free Wall Mean T2, 22 ± 8 ms for Septum FWHM T2, 20 ± 7 ms for Free Wall FWHM T2, 16.8 ± 1.0% for Septum Ecc, and 17.6 ± 1.1% for Free Wall Ecc. Row N2 lists 59 ± 24 ms for Septum Mean T2, 43 ± 9 ms for Free Wall Mean T2, 23 ± 16 ms for Septum FWHM T2, 19 ± 10 ms for Free Wall FWHM T2, with no values for Septum or Free Wall Ecc. In Table 2, headers include Case Number, Age, Gender, Diagnosis, Aβ-Phase (MTL), Braak-NFT Stage, CERAD-Score, NIA-AA Degree of AD, Braak-LBD Stage, Presence of Infarcts/Hemorrhages, and PMI. Case 1 is 70 years old, male, diagnosed with SPG7, Aβ-Phase of 0, Braak-NFT Stage 1, CERAD-Score 0, NIA-AA Degree of AD 0, Braak-LBD Stage 5, no presence of infarcts/hemorrhages, with PMI of 96. Case 2 is 62 years old, male, control, Aβ-Phase of 0, Braak-NFT Stage 0, CERAD-Score 0, NIA-AA Degree of AD 0, Braak-LBD Stage 0, no presence of infarcts/hemorrhages, with PMI of 48. Case 3 is 67 years old, male, control, Aβ-Phase of 1, Braak-NFT Stage 1, CERAD-Score 0, NIA-AA Degree of AD 1, Braak-LBD Stage 0, no presence of infarcts/hemorrhages, with PMI of 24. Case 4 is 69 years old, female, control, Aβ-Phase of 0, Braak-NFT Stage 0, CERAD-Score 0, NIA-AA Degree of AD 0, Braak-LBD Stage 0, no presence of infarcts/hemorrhages, with PMI of 24. Case 5 is 80 years old, female, control (mild AD + AGD), Aβ-Phase of 3, Braak-NFT Stage 2, CERAD-Score 0, NIA-AA Degree of AD 1, Braak-LBD Stage 3, presence of infarcts/hemorrhages marked as 1, with PMI of 12. Case 6 is 56 years old, male, control, Aβ-Phase of 0, Braak-NFT Stage 0, CERAD-Score 0, NIA-AA Degree of AD 0, Braak-LBD Stage 0, no presence of infarcts/hemorrhages, with PMI of 48.
